mapper.select: SELECT symbol, period_date AS periodDate, strong_buy AS strongBuy, buy, hold, sell, strong_sell AS strongSell, raw_json AS rawJson, fetched_at AS fetchedAt FROM stock_recommendation_trend WHERE symbol = #{symbol} ORDER BY period_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_recommendation_trend ( symbol, period_date, strong_buy, buy, hold, sell, strong_sell, raw_json, fetched_at ) VALUES
( #{item.symbol}, #{item.periodDate}, #{item.strongBuy}, #{item.buy}, #{item.hold}, #{item.sell}, #{item.strongSell}, #{item.rawJson}, #{item.fetchedAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE strong_buy = VALUES(strong_buy), buy = VALUES(buy), hold = VALUES(hold), sell = VALUES(sell), strong_sell = VALUES(strong_sell), raw_json = VALUES(raw_json), fetched_at = VALUES(fetched_at)
